title: Ignition Failure
shortDescription: The water heater failed to ignite after multiple attempts
fullDescription: Error code 02 on Rinnai tankless water heaters indicates the water heater failed to ignite after multiple attempts. This is a diagnostic code that helps identify the specific issue for repair.

causes.cause: No gas supply to the unit

symptoms: Unit tries to start but stops

fixSteps.title: Reset the unit
fixSteps.instruction: Press the ON/OFF button to turn off. Wait 30 seconds and turn back on.

fixSteps.title: Inspect for obvious issues
fixSteps.instruction: Check for obvious problems related to ignition failure. Look for blockages, loose connections, or damage.

fixSteps.title: Clean affected components
fixSteps.instruction: Clean any dirty or scaled components. For flame issues, clean the flame rod with fine sandpaper.

fixSteps.title: Call a Rinnai technician
fixSteps.instruction: If the error persists, contact a Rinnai-certified technician for professional diagnosis.

whenToCallPro: If the error persists after basic troubleshooting or involves gas components.

faq.q: What does error code 02 mean on my Rinnai?

Error 02 should be addressed promptly to restore operation and ensure safety.
